Tests the properties of the `length` attribute in `Function.prototype.toString`.

# Purpose
This code is a test script that verifies the properties of the `Function.prototype.toString` method in JavaScript. It checks that the `toString` method has a `length` property and confirms that this property is not enumerable. The script iterates over the properties of `Function.prototype.toString` to ensure that the `length` property does not appear in the enumeration, which aligns with the expected behavior of non-enumerable properties. This script provides narrow functionality focused on validating specific characteristics of the `toString` method's `length` property.
